title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 9–12, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Nojiko starts revealing the past that shaped Nami, Bellemere, and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: belliemere, you don't seem to be eating much these days.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I'm eating my oranges, aren't I? Besides, I'm on a diet right now.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Umm...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't need to eat so much either.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ha, there's no need for you to be so concerned with your looks just yet. It's important for kids to eat a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's just a lie!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's because we're poor that you don't have enough to eat, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What, is that true!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Like I said, I'm on a diet! You kids should never underestimate the beautifullying power of an orange!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I may be 30 but it's thanks to the oranges that I'm still able to have such smooth skin.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But your hands are yellow.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just shut up and eat!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Look, Nami! It's finished!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A belliemere brand haute culture!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't want it. It's just a hand-me-down from Nojiko again.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well there's nothing we can do about it. You are 2 years younger than me.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It used to be a sunflower before.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wanna wear new clothes too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have to wear secondhand clothes too! You're my younger sister so it's only natural that you get my hand-me-downs!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now then, time to tend to the oranges. (1)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But it's not like we're really sisters!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We aren't even connected by blood!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!? Well I wish I n...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Bellie- mere...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So what if you two aren't connected by blood!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's nothing so special about that!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't ever say such a stupid thing ever again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why not!? You're not my real mom either!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I bet you wish we weren't around!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then you'd be able to eat proper meals!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And buy clothes you like! And you could live the way you want!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I... I wish I were adopted by a rich family!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fine, do what you want!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know you anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you hate this family so much, then why don't you just leave!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop it, you two!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fine, I WILL leave!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah! Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NAMI...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere! Nami's doesn't actually believe what she said!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hiya...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It was just in the heat of the moment!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko... you're such a prudent child...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I under- stand... I guess I wasn't very adult-like...

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
